description: A horizontal card placed at the bottom of detail pages linking to a related article or story. Displays an image, date, category, title, and optional reading time.

FR-01.title: Section Label
FR-01.description: The block SHOULD display an H2 label 'Related content' above the card.

FR-02.title: Card Image
FR-02.description: The card MUST display a thumbnail image on the left.

FR-03.title: Card Metadata
FR-03.description: The card MUST display article metadata: date, category, and reading time.

FR-04.title: Card Title
FR-04.description: The card MUST display the related article title as an H4 heading.

FR-05.title: Full Card Link
FR-05.description: The entire card MUST be clickable, linking to the related article.
acceptance: Single anchor wrapping the entire card

FR-06.title: Responsive Behavior
acceptance: Mobile: Image on top, content below

accessibility.AC-01: Card link MUST have descriptive accessible name
accessibility.AC-02: Image MUST have meaningful alt text
